LanguageData.Diary_Odyssey.label: Odyssey gravship journey policy
LanguageData.Diary_Odyssey.mobileHomeNarrativeFormat: At this event, the writer was aboard {0}, their exact gravship home at {1}.
LanguageData.Diary_Odyssey.seasonalFloodNarrativeForm: At this event, seasonal floodwater remained present on the map where the writer was aboard {0} at {1}.
